scripts.test:smoke: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && TEST_PROFILE=smoke k6 run --out json=results/results.json scenarios/search.js
scripts.test:load: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && TEST_PROFILE=load k6 run --out json=results/results.json scenarios/search.js
scripts.test:load:json: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && TEST_PROFILE=load k6 run --out json=results/results-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).json scenarios/search.js
